name: Beast Mode
content: Beast Mode is a burger truck that sometimes visits the university campus and accepts campus meal money. They make the best veggie patties I have had in Alabama, as well as representing the best vegetarian option on campus. In addition, they offer a wide range of specials on rotation. The people that run the food truck are very nice, and I always enjoyed chatting with them. I wish the university would let them hook up to mains power instead of forcing them to run a generator.
